---
title: "George Peabody"
---

## George Peabody

**Dates:** (1795-1869)

### Description

American philanthropist

### Biography

He was born in Danvers (later Peabody), Mass., U.S.A..

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 15th [1869]
- Letter from May 23. 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
